sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_quantiles (id UInt32, value Float64, weight UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT quantileTDigestWeighted(0.5)(value, weight) AS median_weighted FROM test_quantiles;
UPDATE test_quantiles SET weight = weight + 1 WHERE id = 2;
SELECT quantileTDigestWeighted(0.75)(value, weight) AS upper_quantile_weighted FROM test_quantiles;
